footer.recife: Crafting digital structures from Recife, Brazil.

about.title: About
about.headline: Architecting digital structures with a focus on precision, performance, and polish.
paragraphs: I am a Front-end Developer with a degree in Architecture and Urbanism. This background shaped how I write code: I don’t just build interfaces; I design digital structures that are modular, performant, and visually balanced. With 4 years of experience, I specialize in crafting scalable web solutions using React, Next.js, and TypeScript.

Lately, I’ve been focusing on improving platform performance through smart component reuse and modern framework architectures. My goal is always to deliver software that isn’t just functional, but inherently polished and well-structured.
When I’m not coding, I’m usually out on a bike or at a music festival. The energy of live music and the rhythm of a long ride are the perfect balance to the precision of engineering.
